summary_en: 280,000 shares (1.38% S/O) to be acquired. Upper limit ¥1,000M. Open-market method on Tokyo Stock Exchange. Execution window: May 15 – Nov 11, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Decision on Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Shares (Acquisition of Treasury Shares Pursuant to Article 459, Paragraph 1 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Denyo Co., Ltd.'s board of directors resolved to acquire up to 280,000 treasury shares (1.38% of outstanding shares) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥1,000 million, pursuant to Article 459(1) of the Companies Act and the company's articles of incorporation. The acquisition will be executed via open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from May 15 to November 11, 2026. The company stated the purpose is to improve capital efficiency, enhance shareholder returns, and preserve flexibility for future capital allocation decisions.
